channel.title: Rant on Eira Hazel
channel.description: Recent content in Rant on Eira Hazel

item.title: Fuck You Apple
item.description: Feb 8 is my birthday i’ve been tortured by fucking phones since the 6th i feel like shit i hate iphone it has the most retarded back logic in the world and uncustomizable desktop arrogantly thinking what they give users is the best despite that i still felt the power of iphone ecosystem in 13mini and se3 experience the former was kicked because retarded oled screen doesn’t make my eyes sick the latter because i’m a 188cm human se3 is brain dead for me so i planned to kick se3 too now i realize the root cause of everything is because i bought apple watch i don’t want to be anxious about this anymore i want to thoroughly permanently remove these problems perfect answer doesn’t exist i don’t need to find it i need to use my time on things that actually need it the attention i spent on this has become very uncontrollable compared to the attention liberation i’d get after finding the perfect solution i hope to quickly resolve these and get back to life
